meta.note: Canonical STABLE token layer — the dimensions locked via pixel-sampling + v2 probes. The token-playground reads/writes this file; it is the source of truth for the stable layer. Compositional/template tokens are NOT here yet (still being discovered in probes).
meta.provenance: surfaces + accent axis pixel-sampled from source slides; values confirmed against the locked v2 mockups

axis_ramp._note: the warm-metal axis as an ORDERED SCALE (grammar-3 ordinal colouring): collections step it in order; interpolate in OKLCH for arbitrary N; browser previews may approximate in RGB like the warmth lerp

scaffold._note: the piece scaffold's own inks — the table the paper lies on and the blueprint grid drawn on it. Sampled from the locked scaffold (surface/styles/piece.css day one); minted as tokens 2026-06-12 so the scanner can name their addresses.

warm_pole._note: the golden-hour gradient family — the render stand-in for warm-pole imagery (deck s1/s16 ground; phone.css .warmbg; warm immersive pieces). An ORDERED ramp, light to deep. Minted 2026-06-12 from the family already in use.

role_hues._note: PRODUCT-MODE family: distinguishing concurrent users/roles in collaborative UI — a controlled rainbow (pink/teal/green/purple layer edges + matched person icons). The quarantine carve-out: role hues are SEMANTIC, not decorative; they exist only where multiple humans must be told apart.
role_hues.values: UNSAMPLED — capture from product when available

type_hues._note: Type→colour for the Graph. File types group into CATEGORIES; each category is a muted DNA palette tone (surface/components/vee/palette.js theme names → var(--palette-<name>-primary)) chosen to be DISTINCT from the folder BRONZE (folders own brown) AND from the 6 STATE_MAP themes (idle slate-blue, launching warm-bronze, thinking soft-mauve, tool-use gold, error soft-coral, success sage-green). Tim's allocation: green=visual · blue=docs · grey=code; + data (plum) + web (teal). Add a type → it inherits its category (registry-driven, universal). The icon shape stays the primary decoder; colour is the category signal.

warmth_anchors._note: The warmth dial (0=cool .. 100=warm) lerps the surfaces between these anchors at near-equal lightness (hue shift, never blue). warmth=50 ≈ the color.surface values above.

family.script_accent: ESTIMATED — a script/handwritten accent face for human-warmth moments ('find your style' panel title, vt-arch p3); face unidentified, role corpus-direct

roles._note: the role table — each role binds size(scale)+weight+colour+one_line. claim-title LEADS+centers. figure colour = MUTED gold (Tim decision-1), NOT bright.

shadow._note: DERIVED elevation ladder (verified: soft warm-ink, low alpha, r8-12; device-hero deeper). lift_0=rest · lift_1=chip/panel float · lift_2=recommended/hero · recess=inset well (a tray) · hero=device-hero. soft/float/chip = back-compat aliases.

chrome._note: the two chrome modes' material values (grammar-3 chrome_modes). PROVENANCE: estimated from deck s1/s16 MENU pill + s5/s16 frosted cards — not pixel-sampled; confirm against real product chrome.

gold_budget._note: Gold is rare/precious brand emphasis, NOT a default UI state (Tim 2026-06-21). A RULE the generator + the QA lint enforce.

layout._note: Responsive layout RULES as tokens (interim: phone.css @media consume these; later the device-axis resolver computes from screen-size). Tim 2026-06-21.

content_budget._note: Per-slot text caps so generated copy fits + components stay uniform (no 2-line-wrap drift). Overflow CHANGES LAYOUT (density mode / stack), never breaks the visual. Char caps assume the sans face; re-derive if the face changes.
